seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: skin the weighted Max-SAT substrate as wind-tunnel sensor mode calibration, and shape the instance distribution (positive-biased polarity + a controlled block of negative-only, heavy-tailed-weight requirements) so the all-0 baseline is weak while opposing requirements create genuine variable conflicts -> neither all-0 nor all-1 is optimal and heuristics diverge.
title: Windward Array: Sensor Mode Calibration
strategies: do-nothing baseline: ship the all-0 (low-gain) calibration -> exactly the checker baseline
weighted majority voting: independently set each sensor to the mode with greater total incident satisfied weight (one pass, ignores clause interactions)
hill-climbing local search: start from the majority assignment and repeatedly flip any sensor whose flip increases total satisfied weight until a local optimum
seeded randomized multi-restart: run hill-climbing from many shuffled initial assignments and keep the best satisfied weight found
